content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886


February 5, 2008
Sharon D. Stuart
City Attorney's Office
City of Lompoc
100 Civic Center Plaza
Lompoc, CA 93438-8001

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. 08-006

Dear Ms. Stuart:

This letter responds to your request for advice on behalf of Lompoc City Councilmember Mike Siminski regarding the conflict-of-interest provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act").¹

Per your letter of January 30, 2008, you no longer need written advice because the project referred to in your request has been withdrawn by the applicant.

Your request for advice has therefore been withdrawn. Should you have any questions, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel

By: Valentina Joyce
Counsel, Legal Division

VJ:jgl


¹ Government Code Sections 81000 through 91014. Commission regulations appear at Sections 18110 through 18997 of Title 2 of the California Code of Regulations.
